B4_triple_name_rule._note: Baseline implementation assumes Western 'First Last' decomposition. Methodology R11 documents 8 decomposition cases (CJK, patronymic, double-surname, etc.) requiring per-language extension. Review violations to distinguish real failures from decomposition-rule gaps.
